creator: ports@logvinov.com
text:
Hello!

  BTW I have a new patch with ETCDIR macro implementation.
  
  Build logs and diffs of some ports with ETCDIR macro:
  
  print/cups-base
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/cups-base-1.2.10.log
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/cups-base.diff
  
  dns/dns_balance
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/dns_balance-2.0.log
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/dns_balance.diff
  
  security/fwanalog
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/fwanalog-0.6.9.log
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/fwanalog.diff
  
  www/gforge
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/gforge-4.5.16.log
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/gforge.diff
  
  www/lightsquid
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/lightsquid-1.7.1.log
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/lightsquid.diff
  
  games/mtaserver
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/mtaserver-0.5_1.log
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/mtaserver.diff
  
  dns/opendd
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/opendd-0.7.8.log
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/opendd.diff
  
  security/samba-vscan
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/samba-vscan-0.3.6b_1.log
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/samba-vscan.diff
  
  mail/sqlgrey
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/sqlgrey-1.7.4.log
  http://www.logvinov.com/files/etcdir/sqlgrey.diff
      
  Patch:

Index: bsd.port.mk
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk,v
retrieving revision 1.557
diff -u -r1.557 bsd.port.mk
--- bsd.port.mk	24 Mar 2007 14:02:06 -0000	1.557
+++ bsd.port.mk	26 Mar 2007 11:54:13 -0000
@@ -1367,6 +1367,12 @@
 
 TARGETDIR:=		${DESTDIR}${PREFIX}
 
+DOCSDIR?=		${TARGETDIR}/share/doc/${PORTNAME}
+EXAMPLESDIR?=		${TARGETDIR}/share/examples/${PORTNAME}
+DATADIR?=		${TARGETDIR}/share/${PORTNAME}
+WWWDIR?=		${TARGETDIR}/www/${PORTNAME}
+ETCDIR?=		${TARGETDIR}/etc/${PORTNAME}
+
 .if defined(USE_LINUX_RPM)
 .include "${PORTSDIR}/Mk/bsd.linux-rpm.mk"
 .endif
@@ -1613,7 +1619,7 @@
 		DESTDIR=${DESTDIR} TARGETDIR=${TARGETDIR}
 SUB_LIST+=	PREFIX=${PREFIX} LOCALBASE=${LOCALBASE_REL} X11BASE=${X11BASE_REL} \
 		DATADIR=${DATADIR} DOCSDIR=${DOCSDIR} EXAMPLESDIR=${EXAMPLESDIR} \
-		WWWDIR=${WWWDIR} DESTDIR=${DESTDIR} TARGETDIR=${TARGETDIR}
+		WWWDIR=${WWWDIR} ETCDIR=${ETCDIR} DESTDIR=${DESTDIR} TARGETDIR=${TARGETDIR}
 
 PLIST_REINPLACE+=	dirrmtry stopdaemon
 PLIST_REINPLACE_DIRRMTRY=s!^@dirrmtry \(.*\)!@unexec rmdir %D/\1 2>/dev/null || true!
@@ -2959,19 +2965,17 @@
 INFO_PATH?=	info
 .endif
 
-DOCSDIR?=	${TARGETDIR}/share/doc/${PORTNAME}
 DOCSDIR_REL?=	${DOCSDIR:S,^${TARGETDIR}/,,}
-EXAMPLESDIR?=	${TARGETDIR}/share/examples/${PORTNAME}
 EXAMPLESDIR_REL?=	${EXAMPLESDIR:S,^${TARGETDIR}/,,}
-DATADIR?=	${TARGETDIR}/share/${PORTNAME}
 DATADIR_REL?=	${DATADIR:S,^${TARGETDIR}/,,}
-WWWDIR?=	${TARGETDIR}/www/${PORTNAME}
 WWWDIR_REL?=	${WWWDIR:S,^${TARGETDIR}/,,}
+ETCDIR_REL?=	${ETCDIR:S,^${TARGETDIR}/,,}
 
 PLIST_SUB+=	DOCSDIR="${DOCSDIR_REL}" \
 		EXAMPLESDIR="${EXAMPLESDIR_REL}" \
 		DATADIR="${DATADIR_REL}" \
-		WWWDIR="${WWWDIR_REL}"
+		WWWDIR="${WWWDIR_REL}" \
+		ETCDIR="${ETCDIR_REL}"
 
 DESKTOPDIR?=		${TARGETDIR}/share/applications
 _DESKTOPDIR_REL=	${DESKTOPDIR:S,^${TARGETDIR}/,,}/
